title: Black Nylon Cable Ties 150 (150 mm × 2.5 mm) 6 Inch NCS35® Heavy Duty, Self-Locking, UV Resistant, Multi-Purpose Plastic Cable Managment Tie Wraps 8 kg Tensile Strength for Electrical,Nylon Zip Ties
features: Durable & Strong Performance – Made from premium Nylon, these Cable Clips (150mm×2.5mm) 6 Inch Black cable ties deliver a minimum tensile strength of 8 kg, ensuring a reliable hold for everyday and heavy-duty tasks. Ideal for securing electrical wires, computer cables, home DIY projects, and industrial applications where dependable strength is essential.

Versatile Cable Management – Designed to handle a maximum bundle diameter of 35 mm, these self-locking zip ties provide neat, professional organisation. Perfect for tidying up messy computer wires, audio cables, TV leads, charging cords, garden hoses, pipes, and automotive wiring, keeping workspaces and homes clutter-free.

UV Resistant & Long-Lasting – Manufactured with UV-resistant nylon, these ties withstand outdoor exposure without becoming brittle. Suitable for indoor and outdoor cable management, gardening, fencing, greenhouse support, and securing items in warehouses or workshops, making them a must-have for electricians, technicians, and DIY enthusiasts.

Reliable in Extreme Conditions – With a wide working temperature range of –45 °C to +85 °C, these black nylon cable ties perform in harsh weather and industrial environments. From freezing cold to hot summer days, they maintain flexibility and strength, making them suitable for construction sites, outdoor repairs, and automotive maintenance.

Quick & Secure Self-Locking Design – The strong self-locking mechanism ensures fast, tool-free application with no slipping or loosening. Great for bundling electrical wire harnesses, organising office cables, securing pipes, fastening bags, camping gear, or DIY repairs a practical solution for home, office, garden, garage, and professional use.
description: Black Nylon Cable Ties (150mm×2.5mm) 6 Inch ( Known as Cable Clips) Pack of 150 Heavy Duty & UV Resistant High Strength & Durability: Made from premium Nylon with a minimum tensile strength of 8 kg – reliable for heavy-duty bundling and securing. Perfect Cable Management: Supports bundles up to 35 mm diameter. Ideal for tidying computer wires, electrical cables, TV leads, office cords, and automotive wiring. UV Resistant & Weatherproof: Designed for long-lasting outdoor and indoor use, resisting sunlight and preventing brittleness over time. Wide Temperature Range: Performs in extreme conditions from –45 °C to +85 °C, ensuring flexibility and strength in any environment. Multi-Purpose Applications: Great for home, garden, garage, and workshop. Use for fastening pipes, DIY repairs, supporting plants, or securing items in storage and travel. Quick & Secure Locking: Self-locking mechanism ensures a firm grip with no slipping – easy to use, tool-free, and dependable. These versatile black cable ties are a must-have for electricians, contractors, technicians, and everyday household use – delivering reliable performance wherever you need strong and tidy fastening.
